rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RONALD BALA ROMINE
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 05/20/2026. Issue necessitating continuance: The instant petition requests an extension for "as long as possible" or for the probate referee to appraise the remaining assets in the estate. In a supplemental declaration verified by petitioner, please request a more specific time frame. For the Court to make an order, the report and petition must include a prayer specifying the relief sought (LRSF 14.35.J.2). Please address the above issue and deliver courtesy copies of all further filings to this examiner no later than 05/04/2026 to avoid additional continuance.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DELMAR OKEEFE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required for the judicial officer to review and determine whether this petition should be taken off calendar or denied without prejudice, for lack of showing satisfactory progress to address the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 10/09/2025): 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 2) An amended DE-147 form must be filed to list petitioner's telephone number at item 2 (on page 2). 3) A second supplement verified by petitioner must be filed in response to the following: i) Item 3g(2)(c) of the petition must be checked, with petitioner's relationship to the decedent specified. ii) Item 8 must list petitioner. iii) Item 8 must allege whether Agnes Okeefe left any issue. iv) Item 8 must identify Daniel Okeefe Jr.'s successors in interest. A family tree showing the names and dates of death of all predeceased heirs of Daniel Okeefe Jr. including his grandparents, aunts, uncles, and their issue must be provided, and each surviving heir's parent who would have been an heir must be specified. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF DANIEL J. OKEEFE JR.
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required for the judicial officer to review and determine whether this petition should be taken off calendar or denied without prejudice, for lack of showing satisfactory progress to address the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 10/20/2025): 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 2) An amended DE-147 form must be filed to list petitioner's telephone number at item 2 (on page 2). 3) A supplement verified by petitioner must be filed in response to the following: i) A family tree showing the names and dates of death of all predeceased heirs of Daniel Okeefe Jr. including his grandparents, aunts, uncles, and their issue must be provided, and each surviving cousin's parent who would have been an heir must be specified. ii) Is "Canonizado" the correct last name of petitioner? Item 8 and signature line listed "Cononizado". The DE-147 form listed "Canomizado". PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CAROLE ANNE DERRY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required for the judicial officer to review and determine whether this petition should be taken off calendar or denied without prejudice, for lack of showing satisfactory progress to address the following issues (e-mailed to counsel on 11/14/2025): 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. 2) No DE-147 form is on file. 3) No DE-147S form is on file. A pleading cover sheet must be attached to this from for confidential filing. 4) No DE-121 form is on file. A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the form at least 15 days before the hearing. 5) If the decedent died intestate: i) "Probate of" and "Lost" boxes must be unchecked in the petition caption. ii) Item 2a of the petition must be unchecked. 6) Item 2d: At least one box must be checked. 7) Item 6d must be checked if the decedent was survived by cousins as issue of grandparents. 8) A family tree including the names and dates of death of all predeceased heirs of the decedent, including the decedent's parents, siblings, and their issue (nephews, nieces, etc.), together with the decedent's grandparents, uncles, aunts, and their issue, must be provided. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.
